description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: In the stablecoin directory, filter for USD-pegged coins with a risk score below 3 and market cap over $5B, then add the two largest by market cap to a side-by-side comparison.
tasks.name: In the stablecoin directory, filter for USD-pegged coins with a risk score below 3 and market cap over $5B, then add the two largest by market cap to a side-by-side comparison.

tasks.instruction: From the education section, save an intermediate-level article about how stablecoin pegs can fail that has a 10–20 minute reading time and a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then open its share options.

target_names: Stablecoin Peg Failures: What Goes Wrong and How to Spot Risks

tasks.name: From the education section, save an intermediate-level article about how stablecoin pegs can fail that has a 10–20 minute reading time and a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then open its share options.

tasks.instruction: Use the yield calculator to select any stablecoin offering at least 5% APY and generate a 6‑month projection for a $2,000 investment with monthly compounding.

tasks.instruction: From the stablecoin directory, build a watchlist of three coins—one USD-pegged, one EUR-pegged, and one GBP-pegged—each with a market cap between $1B and $20B and a risk score below 4.
tasks.name: From the stablecoin directory, build a watchlist of three coins—one USD-pegged, one EUR-pegged, and one GBP-pegged—each with a market cap between $1B and $20B and a risk score below 4.

tasks.instruction: In the news section, filter for US regulation articles from the last 30 days, then add the most recent story with at least three topic tags to your reading list.

target_names: US Finalizes Comprehensive Stablecoin Regulation Framework

tasks.name: In the news section, filter for US regulation articles from the last 30 days, then add the most recent story with at least three topic tags to your reading list.

tasks.instruction: Complete the risk profile quiz and, from the recommended stablecoins shown for your profile, add one with an APY above 3% to your watchlist.
tasks.name: Complete the risk profile quiz and, from the recommended stablecoins shown for your profile, add one with an APY above 3% to your watchlist.

tasks.instruction: In the help center, open the most-viewed article about redeeming stablecoins for cash and then submit a support request asking how to convert stablecoins back to your bank, completing all required fields.

target_names: How to Redeem Stablecoins for Cash and Withdraw to Your Bank

contact_form.description_includes_phrase: how to convert stablecoins back to my bank

tasks.instruction: Use the stablecoin conversion tool to simulate converting 500 units of a USD-pegged stablecoin into an EUR-pegged stablecoin with a 1% slippage tolerance, then view the detailed breakdown of the quote.
